title: Lost In The Weeds
description: This mod adds pesky weeds to your farming experience!
body:
Farming can be a peaceful process, but some people want more work tied up in their farming.

Introducing: Lost In The Weeds

This mod makes crops have a chance of being replaced by weeds that are tough to get rid of and slowly grow across your farmland if they are left unattended. Currently, the rate they appear at is very low, allowing most of your time spent farming to be uninterrupted.

 

Let's talk about preventative measures:
It's impossible to stop weeds from appearing, but you can do more to make sure they are less likely to appear.

Keeping your farm in a covered area like a greenhouse can go a long way towards keeping your farm sterile and safe from weeds appearing.

Keeping your farm away from natural blocks like flowers, grass, leaves, and weeds can go a long way towards ensuring your crops remain isolated from the aggressive nature of weeds.

 

 

Weeds can slowly destroy crops, and require a hoe to remove (can be done by hand, but it'll take quite a while!) Fully grown weeds have a small chance to yield string, sticks, random seeds, or even dandelions!
